title: M&E Manager
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Lead and manage the M&E site team, including engineers, coordinators, and supervisors, to ensure smooth execution of all M&E works.
  • Coordinate with consultants, subcontractors, and vendors on shop drawings, RFIs, technical submissions, and method statements.
  • Monitor site progress, workmanship quality, and compliance with approved drawings, specifications, and authority requirements (SCDF, BCA, PUB, EMA, NEA, LTA).
  • Plan and manage manpower, work schedules, and sequencing to meet project milestones and avoid clashes with other trades.
  • Oversee Testing & Commissioning (T&C), including integrated system testing, and resolve technical/site issues promptly.
  • Maintain project documentation and manage handover activities, including O&M manuals, client training, defect rectification, and TOP/CSC readiness.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Electrical Engineering; preference for experience with A1 construction companies.
  • Proven experience leading M&E teams on large-scale building projects.
  • Strong knowledge of M&E systems, site safety regulations, and authority requirements.
  • Skilled in coordinating with multiple stakeholders, including consultants, subcontractors, and clients.
  • Proficient in project planning, scheduling, progress monitoring, and QA/QC processes.
  • Strong problem-solving, communication, and documentation skills, with ability to manage T&C and project handovers.

If you have what it takes, please send your resume to syafiqah@ambition.com.sg or click APPLY NOW.
Data provided is for recruitment purposes only. Regrettably, only shortlisted candidates will be notified.
Business Reg No : 200611680D | Licence No : 10C5117 | EA Reg No : R2199023

postedCompany.description:
Ambition is a leading global recruitment and executive search business operating across key international cities. We access hard-to-find, high-calibre professionals within Banking & Financial Services, Finance & Accounting, Sales & Marketing, Supply Chain & Procurement, and Technology.

We believe our size is a significant differentiation in the recruitment industry. We are big enough to undertake large-scale projects for our clients, yet retain the soul and personality of a smaller company. We are best known for our specialisation with in-depth knowledge and expertise, well-established networks, and deep relationships. We work towards ‘building better futures’ for our clients, candidates and our community.

For more information, please visit www.ambition.com.sg or follow us on Ambition’s social media.
postedCompany.name: AMBITION GROUP SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
